# A11yKit

A11yKit is a free, open accessibility toolkit containing free online tools for WCAG 2.2 and EAA (European Accessibility Act) compliance. All tools run 100% client-side in your browser — no account is required, no data is sent to any server, no analytics are collected on tool inputs, and no tracking cookies are used.

## Core Features
- **100% Client-side**: Your HTML, CSS, colors, and data never leave your browser. Perfect for auditing internal, secure, or staging environments.
- **EAA & WCAG Aligned**: Built to align with WCAG 2.2 Success Criteria, ADA Title II, European standard EN 301 549, and US Section 508.
- **Zero Friction**: Free forever, no signup or registration, no ads, and 100% private.

## Tools (Live)

### [Color Contrast Checker](/tools/contrast-checker)
Verify foreground/background contrast ratios for text and graphical UI components.
- Calculates precise contrast ratios.
- Pass/Fail indicators for WCAG 2.1 AA, WCAG 2.2 AA, and WCAG AAA levels.
- Real-time text preview under different contrast profiles.

### [WCAG 2.2 Compliance Checklist](/tools/wcag-checklist)
Interactive compliance checklist covering all 86 success criteria under WCAG 2.2.
- Covers Success Criteria across A, AA, and AAA compliance levels.
- Tracks audit progress, automatically saving state locally in your browser.
- Filters criteria by POWR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust).
- Exports final reports as Markdown or JSON documents.

### [Accessibility Statement Generator](/tools/accessibility-statement)
Wizard to generate a legally compliant accessibility statement/declaration.
- Aligns with EAA (EU), ADA (US), and Section 508 requirements.
- Step-by-step assistant configuring organization info, conformance target, and contact options.
- Exports a ready-to-publish semantic HTML document.

## Upcoming Tools (Coming Soon)
- **ARIA Role & Attribute Generator**: Get valid, compliant ARIA markup and keyboard behavior instructions for standard components (tabs, accordions, dialogs).
- **Heading Structure Analyzer**: Check document outlines, flagging skipped heading levels and missing or duplicate H1 headings.
- **Form Label Checker**: Validate label-input associations, fieldset/legends, and correct placeholder configurations.
- **Color Blindness Simulator**: Process images locally through HTML5 canvas to preview them through 8 types of color vision deficiencies.
- **HTML Accessibility Scanner**: Run complete semantic audits for image alt text, headings, and ARIA roles.
- **Link Text Checker**: Clean up ambiguous link texts ("click here", "read more").
- **Focus Order Checker**: Analyze and visualize keyboard focus patterns and tab sequences.
- **Alt Text Checker**: Audit images for descriptive or missing alt text structures.

## System Info & Standards
- Primary Standards Supported: WCAG 2.2, EAA (Directive EU 2019/882), EN 301 549, ADA, Section 508.
- Tech Stack: Pure client-side HTML, CSS, React, TypeScript.
